---
title: "AgentGhost.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/AgentGhost.tsx"
loc: 67
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.90
style_score: 4.09
intel_score: 6.78
overall_score: 5.54
---

## Intent
React component rendering AgentGhost with 4 logic branches. It exists to provide a responsive interface element for real-time telemetry. Its role in the system is to project background Daemon activity into the visual Sovereign HUD plane.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [Float](file://@react-three/drei)

### Exports
- `AgentGhost`
- `AgentGhost`
- `points`
- `curve`
- `arcedPoints`
- `i`
- `start`
- `end`
- `mid`
- `dist`
- `activeNode`
